title: isodon pleiophyllus
intro: Isodon pleiophyllus, also known as the Chinese dwarf sage or dwarf isodon, is a type of flowering plant in the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and protecting against respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of Isodon pleiophyllus typically involve drying and processing the leaves and flowers, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tablets for medicinal use.
